remarks: 15 Timber Lane, Westport, CT | School Year Furnished Rental  Experience luxury living in the coveted Roseville neighborhood of Westport. Situated on 1.45 private acres at the end of a quiet cul-de-sac, this beautifully furnished 4-bedroom, 5-bath home offers the perfect school year retreat.  Designed for comfortable living and entertaining, the home features two spacious primary suites with vaulted ceilings, a cathedral ceiling family room with fireplace, formal living room, private home office, screened porch, and multiple gathering spaces. The gourmet eat-in kitchen is appointed with limestone countertops and premium Sub-Zero, Viking, and Bosch appliances.  Step outside to your own private oasis featuring a heated gunite pool, hot tub, expansive patio, pergola-covered deck, and beautifully landscaped grounds.  Ideally located just minutes from Westport's award-winning schools, downtown shops and restaurants, Compo Beach, Longshore Club Park, Metro-North train station, and major commuter routes.  Features: Fully furnished * 4 Bedrooms * 5 Full Baths * Two primary suites * Heated gunite pool * Hot tub * Gourmet kitchen * Multiple fireplaces * Home office * Screened porch * Three-car garage * Private cul-de-sac setting.  Available for a 9-10 month school year lease. An exceptional opportunity to enjoy one of Westport's most desirable neighborhoods in a private, turnkey home.
